headline: Phillips 66 (PSX) Surges 3.2%: Is This an Indication of Further Gains?
summary: Phillips 66 (PSX) saw its shares surge in the last session with trading volume being higher than average. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions could translate into further price increase in the near term.

headline: 5 Broker-Adored Stocks to Monitor Amid High Inflation & Oil Shock
summary: Broker-favored stocks like PSX, CABO and others stand out as oil shocks and inflation rattle markets, backed by upgrades and earnings revisions.

headline: Okta, Phillips 66 And More: CNBC's 'Final Trades'
summary: Okta shares rose 3% to close at $80.76 on Thursday while Phillips 66 shares gained 3.2% to settle at $178.34.
